Settings.title: Settings

appInfo.title: App info
appInfo.name: Cima Sync
appInfo.description: Seamlessly connect to the Cimarrón WiFi. No more manual logins.

help.title: Help
help.description1: Automatically authenticates you to the Cimarrón campus WiFi network.
help.description2: Questions or issues? Reach out to the developer.

Settings.tour.description: Show automatic tour when opening the app

App.title: Auto login
App.subtitle: Cimarrón Institutional System
App.alreadyAuthenticatedTooltip: You are already authenticated on the Cimarrón network
App.connectedWifiMessage: You are already connected to the Cimarrón WiFi.
App.buyCoffee: If you liked the app, support the development with a coffee

Modal.thanksDescription: If you are interested in working with us, click the button below

github.title: You're exiting the app
github.description: You will be redirected to the GitHub page to see the project code. Do you want to continue?

coffee.title: You're exiting the app
coffee.description: You will be redirected to the Ko-fi page to support the app development. Do you want to continue?

removeDatabase.title: Remove database
removeDatabase.description: Are you sure you want to remove the database? This action cannot be undone.

issues.title: You're exiting the app
issues.description: You will be redirected to the GitHub issues page to report a problem or suggest an improvement. Do you want to continue?

welcome.title: Welcome to Cima Sync!
welcome.subtitle: Your tool for automatic Cimarrón authentication

step1.title: 🌐 Select Your Language
step1.description: Hey Cimarrón! This app automatically connects you to the campus WiFi network. Choose your preferred language to continue.

step2.title: 🔐 Automatic Session
step2.description: Enable 'Remember session' and forget about typing your password. The app will log you in every time it detects the Cimarrón network.

step3.title: 🛡️ Your Privacy Matters
step3.description: Your credentials are securely stored on your device. They are never sent to external servers. You can delete them anytime from Settings.

step4.title: ⚡ Auto Start
step4.description: Want Cima Sync to open automatically when you turn on your computer? You'll always be ready to connect.

CertificateAlert.title: Update required
CertificateAlert.message: A new version is available. Update the application to continue connecting correctly.
